heading: Civil penalties
label: 1955 Civil penalties

L. 91–508section 1951 of this title
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). inserted “or any person willfully causing a violation of the regulation,” after “applies,”.Pub. L. 102–5501988—Subsec. (a). inserted “or grossly negligent” after “willful” and “or through gross negligence” after “willfully” and substituted “$10,000” for “$1,000”.Pub. L. 100–690

children.label: a
children.text: For each willful or grossly negligent violation of any regulation under this chapter, the Secretary may assess upon any person to which the regulation applies, or any person willfully causing a violation of the regulation, and, if such person is a partnership, corporation, or other entity, upon any partner, director, officer, or employee thereof who willfully or through gross negligence participates in the violation, a civil penalty not exceeding $10,000.

children.label: b
children.text: In the event of the failure of any person to pay any penalty assessed under this section, a civil action for the recovery thereof may, in the discretion of the Secretary, be brought in the name of the United States.
